_comment: A week's raw material, in the shape the Run Layer will inject once context.requires resolution exists (TECH-SPEC §5.2). Until then this stands in for it. One decision is deliberately left unresolved so the digest derives a 'stuck' section and a next-week item from it rather than being told about them.

hourly_log.week.text: Shipped the Action Center review gate to my own inbox
Moved wrap and meeting off direct Notion writes
Pricing v2 draft to Priya for a first read
Killed the standalone digest cron, folded it into the daemon plan
Recall index landed: chunker, embeddings, kNN

notion.decisions.week.title: Local embeddings by default, cloud only on explicit opt-in
Whether the middle pricing tier stays usage-based

notion.insights.week.title: A guardrail nobody can see is a guardrail nobody trusts
Every test passed whether or not the vector extension loaded, which is how a silent degrade survives a green suite
